reviews.review_description:
One second, you're chatting with your friends, wearing anime and VTuber avatars, and the next, Goku and Donald Trump are getting in a heated argument about which side of Twix is better, 5 predators are trying to digitally molest a 9 year old boy as Benjamin Netanyahu calls you the N-word. 
What has humanity come to?

So about 3 months ago, I wrote a review here warning people to move to another game till the developers fix their problem. The problem being the amount of predators on here. Well they removed the review, saying that I broke their TOS, but won't tell me what rule I broke. So I'm rewriting my review. 

Please keep your children off this game. I myself have had the misfortune of bumping into predators on here. If you go into a world, you're guaranteed to find at least 1 or 2 of these "people" per world. I suggest finding another game for your kids, one that actually protects them. VRChat does not. They actively allow pedophiles to prey on kids. You'll report them, and VRChat will pin the punishment on YOUR account. So I ask again, protect your children by placing them somewhere else.

Y'all are acting like this is a kids game but when really it's a teen game or up. Y'all are acting like y'all can't make a private server for your friends and you ! like come on people! this is no lala or rainbows with unicorns land. Oh BTW the game is good, and if you want to block an inappropriate avatar you see on someone then block it. 5 stars because this game gives me real happiness compared to in real life.
BTW i think VRChat is having some problems because when i get on it says disconnect but when my friend plays its working for them. I think VRChat is having a few problems with some people.

There’s multiple pros and cons to this social experience.

Some pros…

You can meet some like minded people.

Make long lasting friendships.

Play some awesome games you usually have to pay for somewhere else.

Have your own identity and express yourself through your avatar.

And then we have the cons…

Antisocial behaviour is rampant with no real repercussions for the user.

Younger players are getting suggestive comments from a certain kind of persons which would be illegal irl.

Players younger than 10 get exposed to vulgar behaviour that could really affect them as they grow.



So my final verdict is that this is a perfect game if you want to express yourself and meet up with some awesome people.

But be warned.

As you saw with the cons I’ve listed, this game can lead to heated moments between players. That is where the game could feel like a social warzone.

If you’re a parent reading this, do not allow your child to play as there are certain kinds of people that can expose your child to content no child should see.

If you are planning to play this, heed my advice. If you get into an argument or stressful situation, there is no shame in leaving the instance and finding a new one. Chances are you can find a more calm one with less people in it.

With this all being said, I hope you have a good day.

There are so many dangerous things in this game like pedos and other things i had a person come up to me and say that online dating is ok for kids like wtf? u also run into people spamming the n word a lot and vrc doesn't take action on reports about pedos since they have one on the mod team.

I would like to say that I was perfectly enjoying the game like two hours ago and when I go to get back on after letting it charge I find out I’m logged out and can’t get back in, I don’t know what happened but can y’all please fix it I’ve played for more than a year and I really don’t want to lose all my friends on the account

developer_response.body: If you are having login issues, make sure you're connected to Wi-Fi, as the headset requires it to authenticate. You can log in using either your Meta account or a VRChat account. If you're using a VRChat account, double-check your email and password and reset at vrchat.com if needed. If the issue continues, please submit a support ticket at vrch.at/support and we'd be happy to help out where we can.

Multiple pedophiles are doing illegal things like exposing porn to minors in game and being extremely racist and using too much strong language also get rid of the nude avatars and any other innapropriate avatar, Please.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you're having trouble loading in! A few things worth trying: restart your headset completely, then open VRChat and go to Settings, Debug, and tap "Clear Content Cache." If that doesn't do it, reinstall VRChat from your library. Make sure your Quest is running the latest software update and that you have enough free storage space available. If the issue continues, please submit a support ticket at vrch.at/support and we'd be happy to help out where we can.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing VRChat for a long time now and this as never happened to me before i went to go play VRChat with a few of my friends but as soon as i click on the game it logged me out i tried restarting my vr but it didn't work so i looked to see if their was a update but their wasn't i even tried to log back in to my account but it still didn't work.

developer_response.body: This lines up with a service outage we had, which our team has since resolved. You can always check status.vrchat.com for live updates on service status. If you're still having trouble connecting now that things are back up, restart the app and submit a ticket at vrch.at/support so we can take a closer look.

developer_response.body: VRChat enforces an age-gated content system, in-app reporting tools, and active moderation. If you've encountered content or behavior that violates our community guidelines, the fastest path is the in-app report feature, which routes directly to our Trust and Safety team. You can also submit a detailed report with screenshots or video attachments at vrch.at/moderation. For general account or app questions outside of moderation, vrch.at/support is the right place.

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this game for over a year now, met both the best and worst people I've ever seen, but recently there's been two problems for the past day where no matter what avatar I change into, it won't load, and I'm unable to join friends and worlds in general. Seeing other reviews talking about this, I'm sure it's a problem multiple people are dealing with that needs to be fixed soon.

developer_response.body: To best assist you, please submit a support ticket at vrch.at/support with details about the issue you're experiencing, and we'll follow up from there.

reviews.review_title: A Fun game ruined by degenerates:
reviews.review_description:
Before I start there are few things I want to say:

1: Yes, I know what I’m about to say does happen in other games outside of VRC, but I feel this game still has it really bad that it needs to be addressed.

2: most of this review will be about the community as a whole, but it will have some talking points about the game as a whole.

With that all out of the way I’m going to start with the positive before I go deep into the list of negatives.

Positive:

One thing I will credit this game is the avatars and worlds are extremely creative at times. Some of the things I’ve seen (well some parts of it) have some well crafted avatars and the worlds look absolutely stunning.

Negative:

-Way to much nsfw avatars in public spaces. I don’t mind if the users were in private and both are consenting adults, but I swear everytime you join a public instance there’s a 1/5 chance your going to see one person or a group of the wearing these avatars. It doesn’t help the fact you have said people
who will use these nsfw avatars to do nsfw acts in front of everyone IN A PUBLIC INSTANCE. Like wtf is wrong with you people?!

-The group instances you’re either going to have a decent time in, or your going to run into a group mod that gives Reddit mods a run for there money. They tend to be the most egotistical, narcissistic, or just outright power hungry people you ever met. Heck just recently I was kicked from the instance because I had an avatar that looked like Jesus. It was of if not the most tame things in this game.

-There’s an age verification system in this game you would think shouldn’t be in thisnegative category, but there are two massive reasons why this is the case. 1: It requires you to give your id to a third party system which is pretty shady because it’s asking you to give up your private information. 2: The age verification is behind a subscription service, meaning you have to pay a fee to use said service.

So what do I think this game needs improving on? Well for starters VrChat needs to crack down on users using nsfw avatars in public or be change the rating to 18+. Because the the amount of things that happen in this game is beyond crazy. Overall this community is pretty much doomed, and if your for some reason still planning on downloading this app to just use private insurances with friends.

developer_response.body: VRChat enforces an age-gated content system, in-app reporting tools, and active moderation. If you've encountered content or behavior that violates our community guidelines, the fastest path is the in-app report feature, which routes directly to our Trust and Safety team. You can also submit a detailed report with screenshots or video attachments at vrch.at/moderation. For general account or app questions outside of moderation, vrch.at/support is the right place.

reviews.review_title: Mod Team is Unethical and Dirty
reviews.review_description:
Played the game for close to 8 years, used to really like it but got banned recently, double tapped out of the blue.  Now for all intents and purposes I do deserve the bans.  Though I found out the hard way through my recent interactions with the VrChat mod team through their support tickets.... they do not read ban appeals, my ban appeal was more of a question pertaining to why I was banned, instead of informing me the reasons for the bans are listed in the emails, they simply copy pasted a generic denial to my appeal.  

Now imagine I actually made a ban appeal that was compelling and deserved me an unban or at least deserved to be read.  That did not happen, it was not read it was ignored, I had to make a second ticket to get information, I made a moderation report on T&S Kiwano who had handled my ban appeal, for not reading my appeal and simply copy pasting a reply.  Needless to say the same T&S Kiwano who did my ban appeal, also took my moderation report against himself.  At the time I didn't realize how unethical that was, he did answer my question so I was satisfied and waited out my ban, but come this second perm ban, I realized when I made a second appeal to ask what caused this, and got the same copy paste response, that my voice isn't being heard.

The most concerning part isn't the fact my ban appeals got denied, but that my moderation report was handled by the person I was reporting, the issue swept under the rug, the sheer unethical behavior Kiwano showed was actually staggering since I come from a retail work setting where that kind of thing would get you fired... imagine a police officer taking their own report against them.... it's just completely unethical and wrong.  But yes, I know, Shut up Karen, whatever... My voice wasn't heard there and I don't suspect it to be heard here, but perhaps think twice about playing this game... I don't think it's worth it since the moderation team is unethical, untrustworthy, and frankly kinda rude.

hi my name is lianna im 14 and i have been playing vrc for 3 yrs and i love the game and brought me many of  opportunities ￼. and I love the community that was built.  ￼ all that I have to say is I’m very thankful for this game. It has changed my life ￼I can’t wait for

reviews.review_title: The platform is fine but the users arent
reviews.review_description: Like any social app there is bad people everywhere now the game doesn't have the best moderation but almost all of the issues around VRChat are it's users. I have been playing this game for 5 years now and I will say it's decent, not a game that should be used without supervision but not necessarily something awful. There is actual communities within this game that aren't just bad people. This would be a 5 stars review if they had a slightly better moderation system but in general it's a good game in itself.

YES there are pedophiles, weird people, and completely out of touch people. YES. This game should DEFINITELY be 18+ but only because of those cons. 

A lot of the pros come from the small communities within the lot of people. Theres friendly people willing to help, people really wanting friends. Sure maybe the Black Cat is weird asf but hey, at least you found that weird group at the mirror actually willing to talk to you, right? 

Anyways, super fun game BESIDES the actual cons behind them. 

Ps. If people are weird/a pedo, REPORT AND BLOCK THEM. YOU CANT KEEP A COMMUNITY SAFE WITHOUT REPORTING IT. EVEN IF YOU THINK THEY WONT DO ANYTHING, IT HELPS. Plus, theres other places to report these people as well. Theres HUNDREDS of pedo hunters out there willing to help, theres even websites where you can report ANYTHING and they would still consider it. 

Anyways. I hope who reads this has a fantastic day or night!!

reviews.review_title: Incredible game ruined by toxic players

There is an overwhelming amount of toxic kids, heavy age discrimination, and a disturbing presence of online predators/pedophiles. I love the game itself, but developers really need to step up moderation to make public spaces safer..

Don’t like how someone is talking to you? Mute them
Don’t like how someone’s in your face? Block them

developer_response.body: This lines up with a service outage we had, which our team has since resolved. You can always check status.vrchat.com for live updates on service status. reviews.review_description: There's a lot of creative (non social) areas but empty as a vacuum in space. I got late into the game because I'm not too interested in social apps. Like all things internet, there's plenty of screaming kids and creepers you need to be careful of. I recommend just staying in small groups with people you know in real life. Do not let your kids on vrchat! It was never meant for kids to begin with.

developer_response.body: This sounds like it may be a moderation-related concern. VRChat's in-app reporting tools let you report users, avatars, worlds, and groups right from within the app. For guidance on how to get started, our knowledge base is at help.vrchat.com. To submit supporting attachments for a report, visit vrch.at/moderation.

developer_response.body: VRChat enforces an age-gated content system, in-app reporting tools, and active moderation. If you've encountered content or behavior that violates our community guidelines, the fastest path is the in-app report feature, which routes directly to our Trust and Safety team. You can also submit a detailed report with screenshots or video attachments at vrch.at/moderation. For general account or app questions outside of moderation, vrch.at/support is the right place.

Hi there devs I am writing this to give you an idea for an update this update is to help you and the community so please read till the end

This discussion is going to be about how you could include NSFW avatars and still be a parental guidance age rating let me explain. 

Now I know that you forbid 18+ content but what if you could still have it but only for 18+ verified people like lets say you make a new rule this rule can be simple in any avatar search world they must have a tag that would be for NSFW avatars (I think you know what I mean by NSFW) and these avatars can only be accessed by 18+ verified players now I know you are probably saying but where would the players use them simple in your next update you can include a new world instance the tag for this would be (18+ may include NSFW content) this would warn players that are 18+ verified (and only accessible to 18+ verified players) that the world has potentially got 18+ avatars now another thing you can add is a concent setting on settings that way a player who doesn't want to see NSFW avatars can block it with the concent setting.

(HOW WOULD YOU MAKE SURE THEY CANT USE THE AVATARS IN PUBLIC INSTANCE WITHOUT CONCENT)
 
This is a simple thing to sort out you see if the avatar is tagged as NSFW then you can simply make it that when it is used in a public instance the avatar will only look like a bot and if anyone who is 18+ verified wants to see it they would have to click on the avatar and at the very bottom would be a page that will ask if you give concent to see said avatar so that way your game is still technically a parental guidance age rating so please devs do this if you need any help with any of the description of this please tell me ok but this would help you because then you could also allow people to put NSFW avatars on your main market this would give you more money and yeah it would give players more freedom so if you have read this far thank you and please do talk to me about anything to do with this I love the game and only wish to help improve it and keep you here so you can keep going and also sorry if this took too long but thanks for reading 

##update to original thing##(Why I had this idea)
I had this idea when I thought to myself what could help give the developers more money and spear time and still benefit the players I thought of this after going to ten worlds that all had players who were 18+ but weren't verified that way but they were still asked their age in public none gated instances this made me think why are people not bothering with the age verification system then I realised that the reason was because even if they did get the verification they would only receive a badge this would be after paying money to acces vrc+ and then to get the id and trust in third parties to verify it all of which if went wrong would not be worth the time so people just didn't do it so I thought how would the devs make it worth the time of players to verify their age through VRC+ and this was simply by granting access to NSFW content allowing things like what I have been talking about this way both the Developers and players could gain a benefit and this would also help with reducing baning so yeah thanks for reading.

Yes vrchat has pros and has cons. The game- it’s actually more of a social platform, the social platform has technical issues. I’m not sure y but I just got the new quest 3S, and vrchat was fine. I’ve been playing Vrchat for 5 years now and it only crashed when there was a LOT of people but it was just me in my home world watching YouTube. developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you're having trouble loading in! A few things worth trying: restart your headset completely, then open VRChat and go to Settings, Debug, and tap "Clear Content Cache." If that doesn't do it, reinstall VRChat from your library. Make sure your Quest is running the latest software update and that you have enough free storage space available. If the issue continues, please submit a support ticket at vrch.at/support and we'd be happy to help out where we can.

It just says error I cannot log into my account. I am worried I might lose all of my friends if you’re able to help me, please do and by the way, your game is really good. ￼

developer_response.body: If you are having login issues, make sure you're connected to Wi-Fi, as the headset requires it to authenticate. You can log in using either your Meta account or a VRChat account. If you're using a VRChat account, double-check your email and password and reset at vrchat.com if needed. If the issue continues, please submit a support ticket at vrch.at/support and we'd be happy to help out where we can.
